headline: American Water and Essential Utilities Receive Kentucky Public Service Commission Approval for Proposed Merger
summary: CAMDEN, N.J. & BRYN MAWR, Pa., April 22, 2026--American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) ("American Water") and Essential Utilities, Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) ("Essential Utilities") today announced that the Kentucky Public Service Commission (PSC) has approved the companies’ proposed merger, marking the first regulatory approval obtained in the path toward completing the combination of the two companies.

raw.headline: American Water and Essential Utilities Receive Kentucky Public Service Commission Approval for Proposed Merger

(NYSE: WTRG) ("Essential Utilities") today announced that the Kentucky Public Service Commission (PSC) has approved the companies’ proposed merger, marking the first regulatory approval obtained in the path toward completing the combination of the two companies.

headline: American Water Celebrates Earth Day by Promoting Water Conservation and Environmental Stewardship
summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., is recognizing Earth Day by encouraging customers and communities to help protect and conserve water resources.

headline: American Water Charitable Foundation Awards Over $1.5 Million through 2026 Water and Environment Grant Program
summary: The American Water Charitable Foundation, a philanthropic non-profit organization established by American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., awarded a combined total of $1,502,392 million to 86 organizations in 13 states, supporting communities served by American Water through the Foundation's 2026 Water and Environment Grant Program.

headline: Pennsylvania American Water Celebrates Earth Day with Water Saving Tips
summary: In recognition of Earth Day, Pennsylvania American Water is highlighting the importance of protecting local water resources through environmental stewardship, strategic infrastructure investment and community engagement.
